Wu Xiu еђіи„©
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wu Xiu (еђіи„©). Sent as envoy to Yuan Shao by Dong Zhuo, he was executed by Wang Kuang. Wu Xiu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Wu Xiu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
